---
title: "Sir John Taylor Coleridge"
---

## Sir John Taylor Coleridge

**Dates:** (1790-11 Feb 1876)

### Description

judge, cousin of CMY

### Biography

He married (1818) Mary Buchanan. [ODNB]

### Letters

- [To Sir Walter Besant, Febry 7th [1899?][[footnote:1]]](../letters/3394_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- Letter from July 9th 1877 
- Letter from Febry 12th 1876
- Letter from Decr 17th [1875][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [August 1873][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from April 23, 1872.
- Letter from April 22nd [1872]
- Letter from Jany 17th 1872
- Letter from Jany 26th [1870]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1869]
- Letter from Decr 7th [1869]
- Letter from June 4th [1869]
- Letter from February 28, 1869
- Letter from February 11, 1869.
- Letter from October 6, 1866.
- Letter from April 5. 1866.
- Letter from March 15th [1866]
- Letter from  Feb 21st [1862 ]
- Letter from May 16th 1860
- Letter from April 28th 1857

*... and 7 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
